mapper.select: SELECT id, event_type, title, start_at, expire_at, image_url, external_link, is_visible AS visible, created_at, updated_at FROM site_events WHERE is_visible = true AND start_at <= NOW() AND expire_at >= NOW() ORDER BY start_at DESC
SELECT id, event_type, title, start_at, expire_at, image_url, external_link, is_visible AS visible, created_at, updated_at FROM site_events ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO site_events ( event_type, title, start_at, expire_at, image_url, external_link, is_visible, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{eventType}, #{title}, #{startAt}, #{expireAt}, #{imageUrl}, #{externalLink}, #{visible}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE site_events
event_type = #{eventType},
title = #{title},
start_at = #{startAt},
expire_at = #{expireAt},
image_url = #{imageUrl},
external_link = #{externalLink},
is_visible = #{visible},
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE site_events SET is_visible = #{visible}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
